arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will host Aston Villa on Wednesday night at Parc des Princes. This match marks the return of Axel Disasi, who hails from the Paris region and previously played in France for Stade de Reims and Monaco. arts.ttl: Luis Enrique has rebuilt PSG in his image; now they fear no one
arts.sum: Luis Enrique's revolution at PSG has been a swift one. Once a piecemeal array of superstars, the Parisians are arguably the best team in Europe.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Veteran Faces Major Obstacle for Barcelona Dream Move Amid PSG, Juventus Interest
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have no shortage of talent in midfield, but they’re definitely light on size. Fabian Ruiz is the tallest of the bunch at 6-foot-2 (1.89m), and after him, there’s a noticeable drop-off. Senny Mayulu offers some height at 6 feet (1.83m), but depth behind the 18-year-old is pretty thin. arts.ttl: Aston Villa and PSG fans clash in mass brawl on eve of Champions League tie
arts.sum: PSG and Aston Villa supporters have clashed the night before the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final tie as the French interior ministry battles against rising violence from football fans

arts.ttl: Premier League seals 5th place in 2025-26 UCL
arts.sum: The Premier League will have five teams in the Champions League next season after it secured one of the extra places for performance by its clubs.
